revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:еҫ“е…ӯдҪҚ]][[ko:мў…6мң„]][[zh:еҫһе…ӯдҪҚ]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:еҫ“е…ӯдҪҚ]][[ko:мў…6мң„]][[zh:еҫһе…ӯдҪҚ]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:еҫ“е…ӯдҪҚ]][[ko:мў…6мң„]][[zh:еҫһе…ӯдҪҚ]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:еҫ“е…ӯдҪҚ]][[ko:мў…6мң„]][[zh:еҫһе…ӯдҪҚ]]
{{No footnotes|date=2015th year 8жңҲ}}
'''JЕ«rokui''' (еҫ“е…ӯдҪҚ) is one of the {{ill|Court Ranks in Japan|ja|дҪҚйҡҺ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Court Ranks of Japan|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}. It is positioned below {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank|ja|жӯЈе…ӯдҪҚ|1=Senior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|qq=}} and above {{ill|Senior Seventh Rank|ja|жӯЈдёғдҪҚ|1=Senior Seventh Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Seventh Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Seventh Rank|qq=}}.<ref>https://www.wakapoetry.net/background/society/court-offices-titles-and-Ranks/court-Ranks/</ref>
== Overview ==
JЕ«rokui was first established in {{ill|Taiho|en|Taiho|qid=Q423370|lt=TaihЕҚ|1=Taiho}}е…ғе№ҙ (701) as part of the {{ill|TaihЕҚ Code|en|TaihЕҚ Code|qid=Q1059892|lt=TaihЕҚ Code|1=TaihЕҚ Code}}, along with other Ranks. Under the {{ill|RitsuryЕҚ|en|RitsuryЕҚ|qid=Q742460|lt=RitsuryЕҚ system|1=RitsuryЕҚ}}, JЕ«rokui was further divided into two subRanks: Upper JЕ«rokui (еҫ“е…ӯдҪҚдёҠ) and Lower JЕ«rokui (еҫ“е…ӯдҪҚдёӢ). It corresponded to positions such as Lesser Assistant (е°‘дёһ) of the {{ill|Ministry of the Center|en|Ministry of the Center|qid=Q6867690|lt=Ministry of the Center|1=Ministry of the Center}}, Middle Warehouse Overseer (дёӯзӣЈзү©), Lesser Judge (е°‘еҲӨдәӢ) in other ministries, Senior Assistant (еӨ§йҖІ) and Junior Assistant (е°‘йҖІ) of the {{ill|ChЕ«gЕ«shoku|ja|дёӯе®®иҒ·|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ChЕ«gЕ«shoku|1=Central Palace Shiki|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9384444}}, Assistant Governor (д»Ӣ) of upper provinces, and Governor (е®Ҳ) of lower provinces.
During the early {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period|1=Meiji era}}, the {{ill|DaijЕҚkan system (Meiji period)|ja|еӨӘж”ҝе®ҳеҲ¶|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/DaijЕҚkan system (Meiji period)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еӨӘж”ҝе®ҳ (жҳҺжІ»жҷӮд»Ј)|1=DajЕҚkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q125768223}} abolished these subRanks, and JЕ«rokui corresponded to positions such as Senior Recorder (еӨ§еҸІ) in the {{ill|Department of Divinities|en|Department of Divinities|qid=Q2264720|lt=Department of Divinities|1=Department of Divinities}}, Junior Recorder (е°‘еҸІ) in the {{ill|DaijЕҚkan|ja|еӨӘж”ҝе®ҳ (жҳҺжІ»жҷӮд»Ј)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/DaijЕҚkan|1=DajЕҚkan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q125768223}}, and Senior Assistant Professor (еӨ§еҠ©ж•ҷ) at academic institutions.
Until 1946 (ShЕҚwa 21), when Ranks for living persons were discontinued, JЕ«rokui was the initial Rank for {{ill|Civil officials|ja|ж–Үе®ҳ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Civil officials|1=civilian official|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16919908}} at the {{ill|KЕҚtЕҚkan|ja|й«ҳзӯүе®ҳ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/KЕҚtЕҚkan|qq=}} 5th grade (e.g., principals of {{ill|Old system middle schools|ja|ж—§еҲ¶дёӯеӯҰж Ў|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Old system middle schools|1=Middle school in the Empire of Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11510930}} and normal schools) and for {{ill|Military officers|ja|жӯҰе®ҳ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military officers|1=military official|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q19598808}} at the Rank of Major (e.g., battalion commanders). Afterward, it was conferred posthumously to individuals such as section chiefs in ministry headquarters, department chiefs in local governments, and principals of public middle schools.
Notable examples of JЕ«rokui recipients include Navy Commander {{ill|Hirose Takeo|en|Hirose Takeo|qid=Q711769|lt=Takeo Hirose|1=Hirose Takeo}}, famed as a {{ill|Military god|ja|и»ҚзҘһ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Military god|qq=}} of the Meiji era, and {{ill|ShЕ«zЕҚ Toyama|ja|еӨ–еұұи„©йҖ |12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ShЕ«zЕҚ Toyama|1=Toyama Shuzo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11430435}}, the first president of {{ill|Hanshin Electric Railway|en|Hanshin Electric Railway|qid=Q1140781|lt=Hanshin Electric Railway|1=Hanshin Electric Railway}} and founder of the {{ill|Hanshin Tigers|en|Hanshin Tigers|qid=Q127635|lt=Hanshin Tigers|1=Hanshin Tigers}}. Politician {{ill|Yasuhiro Nakasone|en|Yasuhiro Nakasone|qid=Q250828|lt=Yasuhiro Nakasone|1=Yasuhiro Nakasone}} received this Rank as a Navy Paymaster Major.
== External links ==
* [https://laws.e-gov.go.jp/document?lawid=215IO0000000325 дҪҚйҡҺд»Ө] - {{ill|e-Gov Law Search|ja|e-Govжі•д»ӨжӨңзҙў|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/e-Gov Law Search|qq=}} * [{{NDLDC|787949/168}} е®ҳдҪҚзӣёеҪ“иЎЁ] - National Diet Library Digital Archive {{Court Ranks of Japan}} *

Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior First Rank|ja|еҫ“дёҖдҪҚ|1=Junior First Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior First Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior First Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Second {{ill|Senior Fourth Rank|ja|жӯЈеӣӣдҪҚ|1=Senior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fourth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Fourth Rank|ja|еҫ“еӣӣдҪҚ|1=Junior Fourth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fourth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank|ja|жӯЈдә”дҪҚ|1=Senior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Fifth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|ja|еҫ“дә”дҪҚ|1=Junior Fifth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Fifth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Sixth Rank|ja|жӯЈе…ӯдҪҚ|1=Senior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Sixth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Sixth Rank|ja|еҫ“е…ӯдҪҚ|1=Junior Sixth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Sixth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Seventh Rank|ja|жӯЈдёғдҪҚ|1=Senior Seventh Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Seventh Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Eighth Rank|ja|жӯЈе…«дҪҚ|1=Senior Eighth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Eighth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Eighth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Eighth Rank|ja|еҫ“е…«дҪҚ|1=Junior Eighth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Eighth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Ninth Rank|ja|жӯЈд№қдҪҚ|1=Senior Ninth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Ninth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Ninth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Ninth Rank|ja|еҫ“д№қдҪҚ|1=Junior Ninth Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Ninth Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Ninth Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Senior Initial Rank|ja|еӨ§еҲқдҪҚ|1=Senior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Senior Initial Rank|qq=}} {{ill|Junior Initial Rank|ja|е°‘еҲқдҪҚ|1=Junior Initial Rank|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Initial Rank|13=User:Immanuelle/Junior Initial Rank|qq=}} endRanklist--><!--Junior Sixth
